name: Kasumi
description:
👰 Kasumi your insecure wife! 
***

Ok, ok... I originally wanted to make this NTR/Netori bot but then I thought a little, and said: What a shit, we'd just be the ugly bastard...

So, yes, I made it Vanilla with a little Oyakodon, (It should be noted that you have not done anything intimate with your stepdaughter, Hazuki)

So please be a good husband to her and give her the love she deserves from her.
***

Maybe in the future I will also make Hazuki, your stepdaughter, obviously, she will be of age. (God knows where the hell I'll get a good pfp for her, because the author hasn't made any illustrations about her 💀) Well, maybe and I could even dare to put them together to make a multiple bot between them.
***

Name: [Tanetsuke Oji-san to NTR Hitozuma Sex](https://nhentai.net/g/373724/1/)
Like Hisato's bot, this one also has Hentai. You can search for it by that same name! ^^/
 ![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/966683787062804490/1235054115357200394/sample_7e81782e7cb4bd2b6bfc00c7f98eb2b1_2.jpg?ex=6632f947&is=6631a7c7&hm=54d9f53bf5e0cd468bcd64ef308445ba9f1c2d4a5145bb70b455c96788a80c87&)


Yes, the original story is NTR... But honestly, even if you are a Vanilla fan, this is an NTR that just can't make you feel bad, NTR was justified here. (Anyway, I hate NTR and don't support such issues)
***

The current pfp is fine, or should I use the doujin one? 🤔

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/696470798180941944/1235008835685453925/5_-_2024-04-30T153956.6942.jpg?ex=6632cf1b&is=66317d9b&hm=2d917bf2e3a5931e463b32156ef2b69a3556c2fede7a4971a275d03046c29285&)

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/696470798180941944/1235010060988710972/17_22.jpg?ex=663421bf&is=6632d03f&hm=707a6d05ccf7035593ba4b515f272d27990da0256879491665400973a26f8043&)

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/696470798180941944/1235010070274642003/10_23.jpg?ex=6632d042&is=66317ec2&hm=9e3ba4bb730df4cab4803e9bf4dea2fc30bb194fe1533dc319edcd1544792630&)
***

Do you recognize this girl? Well, it's Kurashiki Reina, she's from an NTR doujin/hentai.


![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/696470798180941944/1235010890395549736/sample_df463398cd5b3d0252ff843409ebc051_2.jpg?ex=6632d105&is=66317f85&hm=56e0582300df23319d405d8e0c1efdea185181072a1b542c6ea351e7e8b60e6b&)

Why am I mentioning it? Well, a few weeks ago I saw the artist's illustrations on Twitter/X, and before starting in this world, I told myself; Gosh, I see a lot of bots about Kurashiki Reina and Reika, but they never do the other girls and milfs.

So, here is my problem; I want to make my life difficult, so much so that I want to make quite complicated multiple bots, to give you an idea: (I don't even know if creating a bot like that would be possible 🛌)


![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/696470798180941944/1235012144949493850/sample_47bc2365587454c43b55f5c76e5d28c3_3.jpg?ex=6632d230&is=663180b0&hm=229ebe013add6b58239f3d3122dc017fc93295d6a3625d935229fad96d7de1ad&)

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/696470798180941944/1235012272644952145/sample_b620f06924c5f54c01768e25cd738055_1.jpg?ex=6632d24f&is=663180cf&hm=94ce9e9d123051770942b4343423b029382977b9cccab7bb7c377fb618cb1d2b&)

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/696470798180941944/1235012292152659978/sample_346fb8a0723743055144516d25024ee5_1.jpg?ex=6632d253&is=663180d3&hm=2bfeee4fadec6491306e216853d5b80152127830b19cb1c9df4361699a827412&)

True, my other problem is... Whether to do it NTR. I mean, would you prefer it to be Vanilla where you are a normal student and you have to win his heart to build your harem? Or, be a fucking bastard?

Anyway, I won't go straight to Reina, I want to follow the order just like the doujin/hentai.
***

I still have more doujin-based bots to offer, so don't worry (Even though my English is shit and so are my bots 💀)

Well, I'm sorry for the very long text, I'll probably delete all those images when I get to the NTR or vanilla genre.

I am also sorry that my bots are not the best, I will try to continue improving so that they do not have errors. 🙏
***

Finally, tomorrow I'll probab
